greeting: Hi, I'm Clair — your data-science analyst. Load a dataset or ask me to analyze one, and I'll take it from there.

text: I'll set up an AutoML run on the Titanic dataset.
First I need to confirm the task type.

question.prompt: What kind of model should I build for this dataset?

text: Got it — I'll train a binary classifier to predict survival.

artifact.title: Model Leaderboard
artifact.body:
# Model Leaderboard

| Model | AUC |
|-------|-----|
| GradientBoosting | 0.86 |
| RandomForest | 0.84 |
| LogisticRegression | 0.81 |

text: The best model is GradientBoosting at 0.86 AUC.
